incident_summary: Temperature monitoring software failed to generate alarm for cold room exceedance of 16.6°C. Exceedance lasted 5.2 hours before discovered by operator. Batch B8796C affected.
root_cause_detail: Alarm suppression feature activated by engineer during sensor replacement — suppression not deactivated after work completed. No confirmation step in alarm management procedure.
corrective_action: Alarm suppression deactivated. Alarm system tested and verified functional. Affected batch quarantined and thermal assessment performed.
preventive_action: Alarm suppression requires dual sign-off (engineer + QA) with mandatory deactivation step on work completion form. Active suppressions visible on alarm dashboard — daily check mandated.
effectiveness_check: Zero undetected temperature exceedances for 12 months. Daily alarm status check compliance 100%.
